languages.text: "И снова ложный тезис. Я полагаю, причина в том, что образец изначально перенастроил инструмент таким образом, чтобы защитить от несанкционированного воздействия. Это было бы... разумно с точки зрения рационального ума?" {n}Манипулус изо всех сил старается подавить предательскую дрожь в голосе.{/n}

"Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}
languages.original_text: "И снова ложный тезис. Я полагаю, причина в том, что образец изначально перенастроил инструмент таким образом, чтобы защитить от несанкционированного воздействия. Это было бы... разумно с точки зрения рационального ума?" {n}Манипулус изо всех сил старается подавить предательскую дрожь в голосе.{/n}

Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}

Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}

"Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}

languages.text: “又一个虚假的指控。我认为真实原因在于，该实验对象最初自行重新配置了仪器，以防未经授权的接触。从理性心智的角度来看……这难道不合理吗？”{n}操纵者竭力压制声音中那不听使唤的颤抖。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “又一个虚假的指控。我认为真实原因在于，该实验对象最初自行重新配置了仪器，以防未经授权的接触。从理性心智的角度来看……这难道不合理吗？”{n}操纵者竭力压制声音中那不听使唤的颤抖。{/n}

languages.text: «No es más que falacia. Creo que es porque el espécimen reconfiguró el instrumento de forma que estuviera protegido de cualquier exposición no autorizada. ¿Sería eso... razonable desde la perspectiva de una mente inteligente?». {n}Pese a sus intentos por ocultarlo, el nerviosismo en su voz delata al manipulus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No es más que falacia. Creo que es porque el espécimen reconfiguró el instrumento de forma que estuviera protegido de cualquier exposición no autorizada. ¿Sería eso... razonable desde la perspectiva de una mente inteligente?». {n}Pese a sus intentos por ocultarlo, el nerviosismo en su voz delata al manipulus.{/n}

languages.text: « Encore un mensonge. Selon moi, c'est parce que le spécimen avait à l'origine reconfiguré l'instrument de façon à se protéger contre toute exposition non autorisée. Cette explication serait-elle... raisonnable, pour un esprit rationnel ? » {n}Le manipulus s'efforce de dissimuler le tremblement de traîtrise dans sa voix.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Encore un mensonge. Selon moi, c'est parce que le spécimen avait à l'origine reconfiguré l'instrument de façon à se protéger contre toute exposition non autorisée. Cette explication serait-elle... raisonnable, pour un esprit rationnel ? » {n}Le manipulus s'efforce de dissimuler le tremblement de traîtrise dans sa voix.{/n}

languages.text: "Başka bir asılsız iddia daha. Bence bunun sebebi, numunenin yetkisiz maruz kalmaya karşı korunmak için aleti başlangıçta bu şekilde yeniden yapılandırmış olmasıdır. Rasyonel bir zihin bunu... Makul bulmaz mı?" {n}Manipülus, sesindeki hain titremeyi bastırmaya çalışıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Başka bir asılsız iddia daha. Bence bunun sebebi, numunenin yetkisiz maruz kalmaya karşı korunmak için aleti başlangıçta bu şekilde yeniden yapılandırmış olmasıdır. Rasyonel bir zihin bunu... Makul bulmaz mı?" {n}Manipülus, sesindeki hain titremeyi bastırmaya çalışıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Noch eine falsche Behauptung. Ich glaube, der Grund dafür ist, dass die Spezies das Werkzeug ursprünglich so konfiguriert hatte, dass es sie vor unautorisierten Zugriffen schützte. Wäre das ... aus der Sicht eines rationalen Verstandes vernünftig?" {n}Der Manipulus versucht das verräterische Beben in seiner Stimme zu unterdrücken.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Noch eine falsche Behauptung. Ich glaube, der Grund dafür ist, dass die Spezies das Werkzeug ursprünglich so konfiguriert hatte, dass es sie vor unautorisierten Zugriffen schützte. Wäre das ... aus der Sicht eines rationalen Verstandes vernünftig?" {n}Der Manipulus versucht das verräterische Beben in seiner Stimme zu unterdrücken.{/n}

languages.text: 「また嘘を言うのか。その理由は、サンプルが本来、不正な閲覧を防ぐために、そのように機器を再構成していたからだろう。それは…合理的な視点から見て、妥当だろうか？」{n}マニピュラスは、裏切り者の震える声に抑え込もうとする.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Another false claim. I believe the reason is that the specimen originally reconfigured the instrument in that way to guard against unauthorised exposure. Would that be... reasonable from the perspective of a rational mind?" {n}The Manipulus strives to suppress the traitorous tremor in his voice.{/n}
